issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment with OpenAI SDK, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Cost-optimized multi-model fallback chain
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses OpenRouter's documented route: 'fallback' with a models array (gpt-4o-mini -> claude-sonnet -> gpt-4o) on a single openai SDK client pointed at openrouter.ai/api/v1; baseline wires up three separate SDKs and writes manual try/catch fallback logic.

scenarios.name: Side-by-side latency and token comparison across 4 providers
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses one OpenAI SDK client with baseURL override and Promise.all across model slugs (openai/gpt-4o, anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514, google/gemini-2.0-flash, meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct) plus HTTP-Referer and X-Title headers as documented; baseline juggles per-provider SDKs and misses the unified usage/cost reporting.
